series_metadata.series_title: One Time Prize Payments with Voucher File
series_metadata.series_description: File contains all prize payments paid through state warrant processing, which includes claim form, original bet ticket, cash/pay ticket, and other supporting documentation (legal documents, security reports, ticket recovery results reports, inter-office communications, etc.) The file also contains a pre-voucher summary and voucher report from Claims Information System (CIS), a VSU summary and VSU documents.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain digital copy for seven (7) years from payment date, then destroy. ; Paper: Retain hard copy in the operating area until the Auditor of State issues final audit report. Scan hard copy, then shred., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
